scripts.type:check: tsc --noEmit && npm run type:check -w @break-that-ice/frontend && npm run type:check -w @break-that-ice/backend && npm run type:check -w @break-that-ice/shared
scripts.dev: dotenv -e .env.development -- concurrently "npm run dev -w @break-that-ice/backend" "npm run dev -w @break-that-ice/frontend"
scripts.build:all:clear: npm run build:clear -w @break-that-ice/shared && npm run build:clear -w @break-that-ice/backend && npm run build:clear -w @break-that-ice/frontend
scripts.build:all: npm run build -w @break-that-ice/shared && npm run build -w @break-that-ice/backend && npm run build -w @break-that-ice/frontend
